name: Fresh Tomato Sauce I
recipeIngredient: 2 large Garlic cloves; peeled and mashed
Imported canned tomatoes; drained, in half-inch dice
recipeInstructions:
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over moderately high heat. Saute onion and garlic until softened. Add tomatoes gradually, keeping the heat as high as possible without browning. Stir in herbs, wine, and any reserved tomato juice; reduce heat to low and simmer for about 20 minutes, or until vegetables are softened and fragrant. Add more wine or water if needed, to prevent sticking and maintain desired consistency. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Yield: About 3 cups.
